Dr. Orna Resnekov

B.A. English 1981, M.S. Biology 1983, University of Michigan, Ann Arbor.

Ph.D. Molecular Biology 1988, Weizmann Institute of Science, Rehovot, Israel.

Thesis title: "Transcription Termination in Animal Viruses and Cells."

Postdoctoral studies: 1988-1991, Karolinska Institute; 1991-1997 Harvard University; 1998-2000 NIH-National Institute of Child Health and Human Development.

Joined the Molecular Sciences Institute in May 2000.
